hero.title: Stories between light and silence.
hero.imageAlt: The Cliffs of Moher fading into mist above the Atlantic

manifesto.title: Photography is a way of learning to pause.
manifesto.lead: raw.vives gathers scenes found between travel, city and nature. A personal archive shaped by light, time and attention.
manifesto.archiveNote: Each image remains here because it still asks for a second look.

chapters.title: Five ways of looking.
chapters.description: The archive is organised through encounters, spaces and conditions of light.
chapters.empty: There are no chapters available at the moment.

descriptions.Fauna: Brief encounters with living forms that do not pose.
descriptions.Arquitectura: Structures, movement and traces of inhabited space.
descriptions.Paisaje: Territories whose scale asks us to look more slowly.
descriptions.Retrato: Human presences within a larger scene.
descriptions.Meteorología: Atmosphere as matter, tension and event.

selected.title: Selected work
selected.description: A concise sequence through the rhythm and range of the archive.
selected.empty: The selection is temporarily empty. The full archive remains available.

archive.title: The archive continues.
archive.description: Photographs made between {startYear} and {endYear}, organised by year and category.

closing.title: To keep looking is also a way of remembering.
closing.description: raw.vives is an open archive: it changes with every journey, every walk and every scene worth keeping.

about.label: About
about.title: Behind the viewfinder
about.body: I'm Alex Vicente. I photograph whatever crosses my path: the light on a cliff at dawn, a lone musician, a street that breathes. I'm not after the perfect postcard, but the moment worth keeping.
about.body2: This archive grows with every trip and every walk. Here I keep only the images that truly make me stop and look.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you want to ask about an image, request a license, or propose a visual collaboration, send me a message.

validation.name: Enter a valid name.
validation.message: The message must be at least 10 characters.
validation.usage_description: Describe the intended use in at least 10 characters.

seo.title: raw.vives | Visual Archive
seo.description: Alex Vicente's visual archive: photography, travel, nature, city scenes, cars, everyday images, and digital captures in a global collection.
